titleStmt.title: SII 24.231: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 231. (A.R. No. 25 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Also records a similar transaction by Piṟaguvāḷi Nittaṉ alias Kōyilpoṉmēyndaperumāḷdāsaṉ, a dāsanambi of Tiruvaraṅgam, to the bhaṭṭas of Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉ tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulacekaratevarku yāṇṭu varuṣam Iraṇṭāvatiṉetirāmāṇṭu makaranāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum cevvāyk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil dāsanampimāril kaṭalaṭaitta perumāḷāṉa vaṇcaṭakopadāsaṉ tampi piṟakuvāḷinittaṉāṉa koyil poṉmeynta perumāḷ dāsaṉeṉ tirunantavaṉam nilavilai pramāṇam . perumāḷ cuntara pāṇ
ṭiyatevar tirunāmattāl Ivvūril vaitta Akaram kodaṇḍarāmaccaturvedimaṅ kalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku Iṟṟai nāḷāl viṟṟuk kuṭutta tirunantavaṉamāvatu . tirukkuṟaippaṟṟil teṉṉoḻukil Eṉṉutāṉa tirunantavaṉattukku Icainta kiḻ pāṟkellai tiruppati śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷil tirumeyattu śrī vaikuntadāsar tiru nantavaṉattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai maṉṟacca viḷākattu Ellaikku vaṭakkum mel pārkellai nācciyār śrī raṅganāyakiyār tirunantavaṉattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapārkellai tirumuṭikku
ṟaikkup perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷukiṟa tiruvitikkut teṟkum Āka naṭuvuṭpaṭṭu Eṉ tamaiyaṉ vaṇcaṭakopatātan Abhāvattu Eṉṉutāna tirunantavaṉa mikutik kuṟai Uṭpaṭa maranilaiyum viḷainilamum Uṭpaṭak kiḻmel kol 6nta Ittiru nantavaṉam kol Āṟemukkālum kol 1 kku U 10 5 Āka Emmilicainta vilaip poruḷaṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅku nallirāci U 100 1(1/4) Ippaṇam nūṟṟu Oṉṟekālum Āvaṇak kaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟik kaiccelavaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai
pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ bhaṭṭarkaḷukku koyil poṉ meynta perumāḷ dāsaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi viṟṟuk kuṭutta Ittirunantavaṉam kol Āṟemu kālil meṉokkiṉa maramuṅ kiṇokkiṉa kiṇaṟuṅ bhāgamum bhāgāśrayamum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷu muṭpaṭa viṟṟuk kuṭutteṉ Ittirunantavaṉaṅkol Āṟemukkālukkum Ippaṇam nūṟṟu Oṉṟekālum vilaiyāvatākavum . Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭc celavolai yāvatākavum . Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māva
ṟutip poruṭ celavolai kāṭṭavuṅ kāṇavuṅ kaṭavatallavākavum . Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ bhaṭṭakaḷukku koyil poṉmeynta perumāḷ dāsaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi viṟṟukkuṭutta Ipramāṇappaṭi mūlyamāṉa paṇam nūṟṟu Oṉṟekālum bharatar pakkalile kaikkoṇṭu Ituve kraya dravyac celavu kaiyyiṭāva tākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutteṉ kodaṇḍa rāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷukku koyil
poṉmeynta perumāḷ dāsaṉeṉa . Inta koyil poṉ meynta perumāḷ dāsaṉ makaṉ samjñaiyāṉamaikku Ipramāṇappaṭi paṇam vāṅkik kuṭutta maikkum Ivai piṟakuvāḷi Aḻakiya perumāḷ dāsaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivarkaḷ Apekṣikka Ipramāṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ perumākkaḷur varatarāja bhaṭṭar Eḻuttu § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruccolaip piccaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirunaṟaiyūr dāsaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ paccaivāraṇa dāsaṉeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirumaṅkai nampi yeṉ § Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
śrī vaikunta dāsaṉeṉ §
Digital edition of SII 24.231 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
